name: Green Pepper
specimenCopy: The same berry as Forest Black Pepper, picked at the same time — preserved green instead of dried black. Two different products from one harvest, caught at different stages.

sensoryProfile.aroma: Fresh-cut grass, crushed pine needles, green citrus zest
sensoryProfile.flavor: Bright, herbal heat, mild resinous warmth, crisp snap
sensoryProfile.appearance: Dehydrated olive-green berries, light and brittle
